Sprint 14 Task Assignments (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18)

Task ID  | Description                               | Assignee          | Points | Due Date   | Status
---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress
HEL-243  | Data ingestion: date format normalization | Amir Hassan       | 5      | 2026-07-15 | Blocked
HEL-244  | Integration test suite: auth flows        | Kenji Watanabe    | 3      | 2026-07-14 | Done
HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

Project Helios — Team Roster

Name: Sarah Chen        | Title: Project Manager       | Email: s.chen@novabridge.com
Name: Derek Okafor      | Title: Technical Lead         | Email: d.okafor@novabridge.com
Name: Amir Hassan       | Title: Senior Backend Engineer| Email: a.hassan@novabridge.com
Name: Liu Wei           | Title: Backend Engineer       | Email: l.wei@novabridge.com
Name: Fatima Al-Rashid  | Title: Frontend Engineer      | Email: f.alrashid@novabridge.com
Name: Tomas Rivera      | Title: Frontend Engineer      | Email: t.rivera@novabridge.com
Name: Kenji Watanabe    | Title: QA Engineer            | Email: k.watanabe@novabridge.com
Name: Nadia Petrov      | Title: DevOps Engineer        | Email: n.petrov@novabridge.com
Name: Marcus Green      | Title: Data Engineer          | Email: m.green@novabridge.com
Name: Isabelle Dupont   | Title: UX Designer            | Email: i.dupont@novabridge.com
Name: Raj Patel         | Title: Business Analyst       | Email: r.patel@novabridge.com
Name: Olivia Brooks     | Title: Solutions Architect    | Email: o.brooks@novabridge.com

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

content.text: I've identified the critical path risks from the assignments. Now I'll draft the deadline risk assessment.

input.content:
Project Helios - Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment Date: 2026-07-12 (based on testing log through 07-11)
Assessor: Project Management Office

=== EXECUTIVE SUMMARY ===
Sprint 14 contains 8 tasks (36 points total). 1 task Done, 4 tasks In Progress, 1 Blocked, 1 At Risk, 1 Not Started.
Testing log shows 10/15 cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 NOT RUN / IN PROGRESS.

At-Risk Tasks: 5 of 8 tasks (HEL-243, HEL-246, HEL-248, HEL-245, HEL-247)
Secondary Concern: 1 task (HEL-242)

On-Track Tasks: HEL-244 (Done), HEL-241 (Low risk)

=== DETAILED RISK ANALYSIS ===

1. HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: BLOCKED
   RISK LEVEL: CRITICAL / HIGH RISK OF MISS
   Evidence:
   - Status = Blocked per assignments file
   - QA Defect HEL-D-014: Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input - FAIL TC-505
   - Severity: HIGH - Affects ~40% of Meridian source data
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15, same day as task due)
   - Confirmed as Open Blocker #1 in project_helios_status.txt - 2-3 day delay estimated
   - Risk Register R-01 (High likelihood, High impact, Score 9) - Active
   Dependencies: Blocks HEL-245 and UAT readiness
   Recommendation: Escalate Meridian sample data request; implement interim fallback parser for MM/DD/YYYY; consider pair support from Liu Wei.

2. HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk
   RISK LEVEL: HIGH RISK OF MISS
   Evidence:
   - Explicitly flagged as "At Risk" status
   - 8-point task - largest in sprint alongside HEL-242
   - Risk Register R-06: Meridian IT environment access delays (Medium/Medium) - awaiting IT infra diagram - owned by Nadia Petrov
   - Risk Register R-04: UAT timeline slippage - 1-week extension already consumed
   Dependencies: Required for Integration Test Sign-off target 2026-07-25
   Recommendation: Daily check-in with Meridian IT; document minimal viable UAT env to defer non-critical provisioning.

3. HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination
   Assignee: Raj Patel | Points: 2 | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: In Progress
   RISK LEVEL: HIGH RISK / OVERDUE
   Evidence:
   - Due date 2026-07-14 has passed relative to test log date 07-11 and assessment date ~07-12-13, still In Progress
   - Project status Blocker #2: GeoSync v2.1 license renewal pending, legal reviewing, target resolution 2026-07-14
   - Risk Register R-02: Medium likelihood, High impact, Score 6 - Active
   Impact: Could block mapping features in dashboard and demo
   Recommendation: Escalate to Legal for immediate sign-off; explore temporary extension license from vendor.

4. HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress
   RISK LEVEL: MEDIUM-HIGH RISK
   Evidence:
   - Test Suite Data Pipeline: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL
     TC-505 FAIL = HEL-D-014 (date normalization)
     TC-507 FAIL = HEL-D-015: Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow at ~210k mark - Severity HIGH, owner Amir Hassan, root cause under investigation
   - Depends on HEL-243 fix for full pass
   - HEL-D-015 is not yet assigned a task ID but will likely spill over into sprint backlog
   Recommendation: HEL-243 fix is prerequisite; prioritize memory profiling for HEL-D-015. If not resolved by 07-17, accept partial sign-off with known limitations for >200k files.

5. HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Points: 3 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started
   RISK LEVEL: MEDIUM-HIGH RISK
   Evidence:
   - Status = Not Started with 4-6 days remaining until sprint end
   - Risk Register R-03 (Medium/High, Score 6) - explicitly calls out HEL-247 not yet started
   - TC-604 Load time benchmark (100k records) NOT RUN - depends on this task
   - Depends on HEL-241, HEL-242, and HEL-245 stability
   - Single-person dependency Risk R-05: Derek Okafor is key person / Tech Lead with no backup identified
   Recommendation: Start immediately; consider de-scoping to 10k/50k benchmark if 100k blocked; assign backup from Liu Wei.

6. HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress
   RISK LEVEL: MEDIUM RISK / WATCH
   Evidence:
   - 8 points with due 07-16 - tight
   - Dashboard test suite: TC-602 Chart rendering - line chart IN PROGRESS, TC-603 bar chart NOT RUN
   - Depends on data table component HEL-241 (which has TC-601 PASS - positive indicator)
   Recommendation: Daily standup check; ensure Fatima and Tomas sync on data contract; consider splitting bar chart to next sprint if needed.

=== ON-TRACK TASKS ===

HEL-241 - Dashboard: data table component - Fatima Al-Rashid - 5 pts - Due 2026-07-14 - In Progress
  - LOW RISK: TC-601 Data table rendering (10k records) PASS. Likely close to completion despite In Progress status. Confirm Done by 07-14.

HEL-244 - Integration test suite: auth flows - Kenji Watanabe - 3 pts - Done
  - NO RISK: Auth suite 4/4 PASS per testing log. Complete.

=== DEPENDENCY MAP ===
HEL-243 (Blocked) -> Blocks HEL-245 -> Blocks HEL-247 & Integration Test Sign-off (2026-07-25)
HEL-241 + HEL-242 -> Required for HEL-247
HEL-246 -> Required for UAT start
HEL-248 -> Blocks Dashboard map features if not resolved

=== SPRINT GOAL IMPACT ===
Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1: AT RISK due to HEL-242 medium risk
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1): AT HIGH RISK due to HEL-243
- Begin UAT preparation: AT HIGH RISK due to HEL-246 and HEL-245 failures

Total points at Critical/High risk: 15 points (HEL-243 5 + HEL-246 8 + HEL-248 2)
Total points at Medium-High risk: 8 points (HEL-245 5 + HEL-247 3)
Total points at watch: 8 points (HEL-242)

=== RECOMMENDATIONS ===
1. Immediate escalation call with Meridian IT for sample data (HEL-D-014) and UAT infra diagram (HEL-246).
2. Swarm HEL-D-015 memory overflow with Amir + Liu Wei + Derek.
3. Escalate GeoSync license to Legal leadership for same-day renewal.
4. Consider sprint scope reduction: Move HEL-247 benchmark or part of HEL-242 (bar chart) to Sprint 15 if HEL-243 not unblocked by 2026-07-15 EOD.
5. Document known issues for Integration Test Sign-off meeting on 2026-07-25.

Overall Sprint Health: YELLOW/RED - 3 tasks (HEL-243, HEL-246, HEL-248) have high probability of missing deadline without intervention.

content.text: I've completed the deadline risk assessment—now I'll verify the file was saved correctly.

content.text:
Assessment complete and written to **sprint14_deadline_risk.txt**.

**Sprint 14 At-Risk Summary (Due 2026-07-18):**

**CRITICAL / HIGH RISK OF MISS:**
- **HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization** (Amir Hassan, 5pts, Due 07-15, Blocked)
  - TC-505 FAIL: HEL-D-014 - MM/DD/YYYY parsing fails, affects ~40% Meridian data
  - Blocked pending Meridian sample data due same day as task due
  - Risk Register R-01 Score 9 (High/High)

- **HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning** (Nadia Petrov, 8pts, Due 07-16, At Risk)
  - Explicitly flagged At Risk, largest task (8pts)
  - Risk R-06 (Meridian IT access delays) + R-04 (UAT slippage, extension already consumed)

- **HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination** (Raj Patel, 2pts, Due 07-14, In Progress)
  - Overdue vs test log date, still In Progress
  - Blocker #2 in status report - Legal review pending, Risk R-02 Active

**MEDIUM-HIGH RISK:**
- **HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline** (Kenji Watanabe, 5pts, Due 07-18, In Progress)
  - 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL: TC-505 (HEL-D-014) + TC-507 (HEL-D-015 memory overflow >200k records crashes at ~210k, Severity HIGH, root cause under investigation)
  - Blocked by HEL-243

- **HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load** (Derek Okafor, 3pts, Due 07-18, Not Started)
  - Not Started with 4-6 days left, TC-604 NOT RUN
  - Risk R-03 explicitly calls out task, plus key-person dependency R-05 on Derek

**WATCH:**
- **HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module** (Tomas Rivera, 8pts, Due 07-16, In Progress)
  - TC-602 IN PROGRESS, TC-603 NOT RUN

**ON TRACK:**
- HEL-241 - Data table (Fatima Al-Rashid) - TC-601 PASS, Low Risk
- HEL-244 - Auth flows (Kenji Watanabe) - Done, 4/4 PASS
